title: About
text:
Biologist from EAFIT University specialized in bioinformatics and genomics.
I’m interested in population genetics, RAD-seq genotyping, and building reproducible bioinformatics pipelines. This site is where I write up projects and ideas as I work through them.
Find me on GitHub.

title: BioFlor
text:
A blog dedicated to bioinformatics projects, ideas, and explorations. Here I document analyses, pipelines, and concepts from the world of genomics and computational biology — written up whenever I get the chance.
Whether it’s a reanalysis of a public dataset, a test of a new tool, or just notes on something I found interesting, the goal is to share it in a way that’s reproducible and hopefully useful to others.



Blog — Posts on bioinformatics projects with code, interactive plots, and writeups.
About — A bit about who I am.
